free_text: Cross sections for the Nb(n,xn) and Nb(n,x gamma)
shaped into annular ring, 25-cm outer diameter, 15-cm
Time of flight measurement made to determine
neutron flux. Background measurement made with sample
out of beam. Pulse shape discrimination used to
NE-213 scintillation counter with shadow bar
placed on axis of sample ring.
Plastic scintillator to monitor flux placed on edge of
beam, 30-meters from neutron source for normalization.
Errors quoted are mainly statistical and
Reactions corrected. Converted to new date
Corrected for multiple scattering and average
transmission of incident and scattered neutron fluxes.
Corrected for self-absorption in sample and attenuation
